title: Origins: Everchanging Piglin
description: Adds a Piglin Origin to Origins mod with three forms you can be depending on what situation you are in. These forms are Hoarder, Brute, and Zombified, all with their unique traits.
body:
### Basic Information
This datapack adds/replaces the Piglin Origin to the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins/)

Piglin is an origin that has three forms that it switches between depending on the situation. There are ways to manipulate it with external effects and every form has unique abilities that make it better for different situations.

If you wish to know in detail what the origin does consider looking at the [Wiki Page on Github](https://github.com/Efimity/efimitys-piglin/wiki)!

### REQUIRED MODS
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins/) *for adding the Origin*
- [Extra Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-origins) *for Custom Powers*
- [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli/) *for Custom Powers*

### OPTIONAL MODS
- [Origin Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes/) *Piglin adds some minor Class Synergy*

### Feedback
If you have found any bugs, you have any questions, or if you want to reach out to me for any reason consider joining my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8MSTTCsf8f)
